zh.lifeSummary: 當Piers Stanley I於1431年出生在英國爾胡頓時，他的父親William de Stanley VI46歲，母親Alicia Houghton44歲。他和Margaret Heleigh至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1456年在威爾士福林爾享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Piers Stanley I于1431年出生在英国爾胡頓时，他的父亲William de Stanley VI46岁，母亲Alicia Houghton44岁。他和Margaret Heleigh至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1456年在威尔士福林爾享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Piers Stanley I was born in 1431, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Stanley VI, was 46 and his mother, Alicia Houghton, was 44. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Margaret Heleigh. He died in 1456, in Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Piers Stanley I est né en 1431, à Hooton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Stanley VI, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Alicia Houghton, avait 44 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Heleigh. Il est décédé en 1456, à Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Piers Stanley I 1431 in Hooton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Stanley VI 46 und seine Mutter Alicia Houghton 44. Er hatte mit Margaret Heleigh mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1456 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Piers Stanley I è nato il nel 1431 nel Hooton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William de Stanley VI, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Alicia Houghton, aveva 44 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Margaret Heleigh. Morì nel 1456, nel Flintshire, Galles, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Piers Stanley Iが1431年にイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンで生まれた時，父William de Stanley VIは46歳，母Alicia Houghtonは44歳であった。彼はMargaret Heleighとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1456年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Piers Stanley I(이)가 1431년 영국 체실르 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Stanley VI(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Houghton(은)는 44세였다. 그는 Margaret Heleigh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Piers Stanley I nasceu em 1431, em Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Stanley VI, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Alicia Houghton, tinha 44 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Margaret Heleigh. Ele faleceu em 1456, em Flintshire, Gales, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Piers Stanley I родился в 1431 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Stanley VI было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia Houghton, 44. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Margaret Heleigh. Он умер в 1456 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Piers Stanley I nació en 1431, en Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Stanley VI, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Alicia Houghton, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Margaret Heleigh. Murió en 1456, en Flintshire, Gales, a la edad de 25 años.
